title: Factory Packet
description: A scoped unit of work in the factory system.

id.description: Kebab-case unique identifier. Must match the filename (without .json).

kind.description: Packet kind. 'dev' packets implement changes. 'qa' packets verify that a dev packet's acceptance criteria are met.

verifies.description: For QA packets: the ID of the dev packet this packet verifies. Required when kind is 'qa', must be null or absent for 'dev' packets.

intent.description: What is changing and why. Must be explicit.

acceptance_criteria.description: Testable conditions that must all be true for this packet to be considered complete. Each criterion must be independently verifiable.

packages.description: Which packages or modules are affected.

phase_ref.description: Reference to a phase if applicable.

owner.description: Who is responsible for this work unit.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when work began. Null if not started.

dependencies.description: Packet IDs that must be completed/accepted before this packet can start.

environment_dependencies.description: Dependency keys that must have matching evidence records.

status.description: Packet lifecycle status. null for legacy packets whose state is derived from started_at and completion records. Review states (review_requested, changes_requested, review_approved) apply only to dev packets.

branch.description: Git branch name for code review. Set by request-review.ts when the developer requests review.

review_iteration.description: Number of review round-trips completed. Incremented each time the developer re-requests review after changes_requested.

feature_id.description: ID of the parent feature, if this packet belongs to a feature.

model.description: Model tier override for this packet. Overrides the persona default. Falls through to persona config if omitted.

instructions.description: Additional instructions for the agent executing this packet. Merged with persona instructions from config.
